pageDescription: Calculate your daily fat needs based on activity level, goals, and dietary requirements for optimal health and performance

activityLevels.veryActive: Extremely Active (very hard exercise & physical job)

function.title: Fat Function
function.description: Essential for hormone production, vitamin absorption, and long-term energy storage

types.title: Fat Types
types.description: Saturated, unsaturated (mono and poly), and trans fats

recommendations.title: Dietary Recommendations
recommendations.description: 20-35% of total daily calories should come from fats, with emphasis on unsaturated fats

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides nutritional estimates only
criticalWarningsList.individual: Fat needs vary based on individual factors and health conditions

importantNotesList: Focus on unsaturated fats from sources like nuts, seeds, and fish
Limit saturated fats and avoid trans fats when possible
Essential fatty acids (omega-3 and omega-6) must be obtained from food
Fat intake affects satiety and can help with weight management

messages.enterInformation: Enter your information to calculate fat needs
messages.resultMessage: Your daily fat needs are shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides fat intake estimates based on general nutritional guidelines. Individual needs may vary based on health conditions, medications, and specific dietary requirements.

seekHelp.title: Nutritional Resources
seekHelp.content: For personalized nutrition advice and dietary planning, consult registered dietitians or healthcare professionals with expertise in nutritional science and individual health needs.

errors.heightCm: Please enter valid height in cm

tooltips.age: Age affects metabolic rate and fat requirements
tooltips.activityLevel: Your regular activity level affects energy needs
tooltips.goal: Your dietary goal determines fat recommendations
tooltips.dietType: Selected diet type affects fat intake level

enter_your_details_to_calculate_your_opt: Enter your details to calculate your optimal daily fat intake
extra_active_very_intense_or_physical_jo: Extra Active (very intense or physical job)
enter_your_details_to_calculate_your_opt: Enter your details to calculate your optimal daily fat intake.
saturated_fat_should_be_kept_below_10_or: Saturated fat should be kept below 10% (or 7% for heart disease risk).
individual_needs_may_vary_depending_on_h: Individual needs may vary depending on health conditions and goals.
focus_on_healthy_fats_from_nuts_seeds_fi: Focus on healthy fats from nuts, seeds, fish, and olive oil.
essential_for_vitamin_absorption_a_d_e_k: Essential for vitamin absorption (A, D, E, K)
supports_brain_and_nervous_system_functi: Supports brain and nervous system function
helps_maintain_healthy_skin_and_hair_78: Helps maintain healthy skin and hair
